title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #4 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell!? You got Oshiruko all over me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Unforgivable words fly andst the banquet....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, cause that craps's not even worth eating!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's better as a hat! Gyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, bring me some of that Oshiruko! Let's have a food fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why the hell do idiots like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get to be completely surrounded by food...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHEN TAMA CAN'T EVEN GET A BITE TO EAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What the hell is that idiot thinking!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These discusses will get us right to the banquet hall. What an idiot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He just made our lives easier!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAAH! The second floor got split in two!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, no! The hall is ruined!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard a brawl going down, so I rushed over.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
